markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss transitioning to a more proactive and collaborative engagement model with WebStax for fwd.digital's website and digital marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital wants a more energetic, inspirational partnership where WebStax proactively brings ideas and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Agreed to move to a product team model with bi-weekly sprints, planning sessions, and consistent communication](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [WebStax's strategy team (Emily, Bruna) will take more ownership in recommending projects/optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Emphasis on creative collaboration, mood boarding, and empowering the WebStax team](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Topics

### Introductions

  - [Emily introduced as WebStax's lead strategist, focused on building the strategy team](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Bruna introduced as first additional strategist, with background in UX, SEO, product management](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

### Current Engagement Challenges

  - [Previous work stream model felt too ticket-driven, not proactive enough](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Need more energy, inspiration, and feeling that WebStax is truly trying to improve the overall experience](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Proposed Product Team Structure

  - [Two-week sprints with planning sessions to align on priorities](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Regular standups and check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [WebStax strategy team takes more ownership in roadmap/recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Allows for more proactive optimizations vs just responding to requests](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Creative Collaboration

  - [Marcel emphasized importance of mood boarding, curation, and free ideation](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Having a streamlined way to share inspiration without formal approvals](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Empowering WebStax to make improvements they see fit](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Discuss story point budget and whether design resources are needed](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Aim to kick off new model on 8/21 after current work stream ends on 8/18](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Jill to follow up with contract details](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Marcel's goal is for fwd.digital to be WebStax's "biggest fan" within 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/xJ2YEjLQUAogHu1x_KdP6vrNNTb-m1tp?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
